overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from an industrial alley onto a commercial street, crosses an intersection, and walks past an active construction site on a sunny day with clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with scaffolding and storage tanks

events.description: exits narrow industrial passage with red scaffolding onto open city street
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: walking through industrial alleyway with large blue tanks and emerging onto the main commercial street

entered.detail: large cylindrical storage tanks with blue horizontal stripes
modern dark skyscraper with reflective glass facade
rusty red metal support structure with cross beams
multiple tower cranes visible against the skyline
distinctive yellow high-rise building with 04 marking

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial alley with large blue tanks and red metal scaffolding. The player walks forward and emerges onto a sunlit city street, revealing a tall black building and a distinctive yellow tower in the distance.

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the right side of the street
continues walking straight along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing digital billboards and sharing the path with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: shirtless pedestrian with tattoos walking ahead on the sidewalk
blue sports car driving down the street

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
tall palm trees lining the street median
tall modern street lamps with orange horizontal light bars

segments.scene_description: Walking along a busy commercial sidewalk lined with large digital billboards on the left and palm trees along the street. The yellow tower remains visible on the right while various cars including a blue sports car drive past on the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with parking garage entrance

events.description: crosses the street at the crosswalk while cars wait at the intersection
approaches the covered entrance of a parking garage with red barriers

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and approaching the parking garage entrance where pedestrians are gathered

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting near the parking garage entrance

entered.detail: covered parking structure entrance with red and white barrier gates

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the street at a busy intersection, moving from the sidewalk to the other side where a parking garage entrance is located. The yellow tower shifts to the center background as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction site walkway with safety barriers

events.description: passes the parking garage entrance and enters the construction zone area
passes a group of pedestrians on the street corner near the construction site

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to an active construction site with orange safety barriers and scaffolding

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt and black pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: active building construction with exposed rebar and concrete frameworks
orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking past the parking garage entrance along a sidewalk bordered by orange construction barriers and scaffolding on the right. The area shows active construction with exposed rebar and building materials while pedestrians walk in both directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined industrial alleyway into the expansive, sun-drenched bustle of a commercial city district. It begins amidst large blue tanks and red metal scaffolding before emerging from the narrow passage onto a bright street where a tall black building and a distant yellow tower come into view. As the camera moves along a busy sidewalk, the environment opens up to reveal towering digital billboards and palm trees while traffic, including a blue sports car, flows along the multi-lane road. The perspective then shifts as the camera crosses a busy intersection toward a parking garage entrance, bringing the yellow tower into the center of the frame. Finally, the scene transitions into an active construction zone, moving past orange barriers and exposed rebar as pedestrians navigate the sidewalk.
